title: ASCII Reference Implementation Expansion
problem: merman-ascii needs a tracked plan for learning from mermaid-ascii and beautiful-mermaid while preserving its model-driven Rust boundary.
gates: cargo clippy -p merman-ascii -p merman --features ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings

evidence.result: opened reference implementation expansion lane and recorded MIT provenance for mermaid-ascii and beautiful-mermaid
implemented first classDiagram ASCII/Unicode slice from RenderSemanticModel::Class with class boxes, members, methods, one extension relationship, focused tests, and verification evidence
expanded single-relationship classDiagram ASCII rendering to dependency, aggregation, composition, labels, orientation, dotted dependency lines, and Unicode markers from typed RelationShape constants

implemented first ER Diagram ASCII/Unicode slice from RenderSemanticModel::Er with entity boxes, attributes, relationship labels, cardinality markers, identifying and non-identifying lines, focused tests, and verification evidence

implemented first XYChart ASCII/Unicode slice from RenderSemanticModel::XyChart with compact vertical bars, stair-step lines, mixed overlays, horizontal bars, title and axis text, inferred numeric labels, focused tests, and verification evidence
triaged beautiful-mermaid graph deltas in FLOWCHART_SUPPORT.md and ported typed thick-edge rendering with ASCII/Unicode snapshots
wired shipped ASCII diagram families through merman public re-exports and CLI/library public-path tests, and documented the flowchart, sequence, class, ER, and XYChart support matrix
closed the reference implementation expansion lane with final gate evidence and explicit follow-on candidates for deferred ASCII diagram/layout work

continue_policy.notes: Lane complete. It shipped tracked MIT provenance, model-driven class/ER/XYChart ASCII slices, beautiful-mermaid graph delta triage with typed thick-edge support, and public merman/CLI integration. True BT/RL graph direction transforms, subgraph direction overrides, color/style roles, state graph rendering, class/ER multi-relationship graph layout, and richer XYChart legends/color/full-size plot layout should be split as follow-ons if prioritized. Do not port parsers from reference repositories.
